# Fronz

> Fronz helps founders get understood by customers, found by AI, and in command of their numbers — lean systems you own, not agencies you rent. Founded and run by Stacey Fronek.

Fronz is a productized growth-systems consultancy for lean, early-stage founders (roughly 1–30 staff). The model is fixed-fee, you-own-it builds with light, on-demand support — no monthly retainers. Every method is built live at the founder's own company, Moxa, first.

## Services

- [GTM Clarity](https://shesthefronz.com/#lines): Positioning and go-to-market clarity so customers understand what you do. Entry: GTM Clarity Jam, $1,500 (2-hour 1:1, recorded): a working session that separates what you sell from how people find it, decides your position, cuts to the one urgent customer, and produces a focus wedge plus a 90-day plan you own. Ladder: Jam $1,500 → Map + Playbook $5,000 → Build $15,000–$25,000.
- [Groundswell](https://shesthefronz.com/#lines): Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) built on authentic community consensus — making AI engines cite your brand. Entry: Visibility Audit, $1,500. Ladder: Audit $1,500 → Authority Build $15,000 → Authority Engine $30,000+.
- [Command Center](https://shesthefronz.com/#lines): A Notion-based business-intelligence layer your team owns. Entry: Blueprint + Live Signal, $7,500. Ladder: Blueprint $7,500 → Core $15,000 → Full $30,000.

## Support model

- One-time builds you own; no mandatory monthly retainer.
- Team enablement included in every build.
- On-call hours: prepaid 10-hour packs at $250/hr.
- Refresh, booked anytime (no cadence): Groundswell $1,200, Command Center $1,200/domain.

## Free resource

- [GTM Clarity Starter](https://shesthefronz.com/#starter): a free 20-minute exercise to map your offers, customers, and tactics on one page.

## Contact

- Email: stacey@shesthefronz.com
